title: Tide-Worn Promises
lyricSeed:
You wrote our names in wet sand
And swore the sea would keep it
But the water always wins, love
I watched the waves delete it
Sun-warmed and letting go now
Barefoot in the light
Every promise you gave me
Washed out clean and bright
